title: Mon, Mar 16 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. Expect mild 19°C temps with a gentle 9 km/h breeze, making for comfortable cycling without strong wind resistance. Scattered clouds and 67% cover provide filtered sunlight and moderate UV exposure, while zero rain risk ensures clear visibility throughout your ride.

title: Fri, Mar 20 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. Expect mild 18.7°C temperatures with a gentle 10 km/h breeze, offering comfortable cycling without strong wind resistance. Broken clouds cover 61% of the sky, providing filtered sunlight and a UV index of 3, so moderate sun protection is advised. Visibility is clear with zero rain chance, making for a pleasant afternoon and evening ride in San Francisco.

title: Tue, Mar 17 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a pleasant 20°C with clear skies and minimal 6% cloud cover, ensuring excellent visibility for your ride. Light 10.7 km/h winds provide a gentle breeze without hindering cycling comfort. With zero rain chance and a moderate UV index of 7, midday to evening is ideal—just remember sun protection.

title: Wed, Mar 18 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a mild 20°C with clear skies and minimal cloud cover, perfect for a comfortable bike ride. Light 11 km/h winds provide a gentle breeze without hindering your pace, while excellent visibility ensures a safe, scenic route. UV levels are high—sunscreen recommended.

title: Thu, Mar 19 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a clear sky and mild 20°C temps, perfect for a comfortable bike ride this afternoon. Light 11 km/h winds provide a gentle breeze without hindering your pace, while zero cloud cover ensures excellent visibility. UV Index of 7 calls for sunscreen during longer rides.
